'''jashuchu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:wuckas|wuckas]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-sh-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wuckas|wuckas]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| jashuchu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæshichith|jæshichith]] || [[word:jæshichij|jæshichij]] || [[word:jæshichish|jæshichish]] || [[word:jæshichi|jæshichi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jashushuchuth|jashushuchuth]] || [[word:jashushuchuj|jashushuchuj]] || [[word:jashushuchush|jashushuchush]] || [[word:jashushuchu|jashushuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jashuchuth|jashuchuth]] || [[word:jashuchuj|jashuchuj]] || [[word:jashuchush|jashuchush]] || [[word:jashuchu|jashuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jashufchuth|jashufchuth]] || [[word:jashufchuj|jashufchuj]] || [[word:jashufchush|jashufchush]] || [[word:jashufchuf|jashufchuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jashuchuthu|jashuchuthu]] || [[word:jashuchuju|jashuchuju]] || [[word:jashuchushu|jashuchushu]] || [[word:jashuchuku|jashuchuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jashuchuth|jashuchuth]] || [[word:jashuchuj|jashuchuj]] || [[word:jashuchush|jashuchush]] || [[word:jashuchu|jashuchu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jashuchuthul|jashuchuthul]] || [[word:jashuchujul|jashuchujul]] || [[word:jashuchushul|jashuchushul]] || [[word:jashuchukul|jashuchukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jashuchuthuthu|jashuchuthuthu]] || [[word:jashuchujuju|jashuchujuju]] || [[word:jashuchushushu|jashuchushushu]] || [[word:jashuchuku|jashuchuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jashuchuthun|jashuchuthun]] || [[word:jashuchujun|jashuchujun]] || [[word:jashuchushun|jashuchushun]] || [[word:jashuchukun|jashuchukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jashuchuthuoro|jashuchuthuoro]] || [[word:jashuchujuoro|jashuchujuoro]] || [[word:jashuchushuoro|jashuchushuoro]] || [[word:jashuchukuoro|jashuchukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
